special_notices.silk_board: High-enforcement junction for signal jumping and lane violations.
special_notices.ecity_flyover: 2W/3W vehicles prohibited on the elevated corridor. Strict speed cams active.
special_notices.bengaluru_mysuru_expway: Speed limit: 100kmph for LMV. Two-wheelers and three-wheelers are strictly PROHIBITED. Automatic number plate recognition (ANPR) active.
special_notices.nice_road: Private expressway. Speed limit: 80kmph/100kmph. CCTV monitored toll exits for overspeeding logs.
special_notices.airport_corridor: High-speed corridor with multiple interceptors. Strict seatbelt and lane discipline required.

violations.plain_english_summary: Compounding for speeding on Karnataka expressways (Bengaluru-Mysuru) and NICE Road. Verified for 2W/4W limit enforcement.
extraction_notes: Strict automatic speed detection on Bengaluru-Mysuru Expressway. 2-wheelers are prohibited on certain stretches.
NICE Road has private enforcement but follows KA Transport compounding schedules for police-issued challans.

title.en: One Way Entry / Wrong Way (Bengaluru Focus)

violations.plain_english_summary: High-enforcement violation in Bengaluru city and Electronic City belt. Compounding fee for driving against designated traffic flow.
extraction_notes: Frequently enforced in Electronic City and ORR areas to manage heavy traffic flow.

violations.plain_english_summary: Strict enforcement for overloading on Bengaluru-Tumakuru and Airport Road. Penalty scales with excess weight.
extraction_notes: Weigh-bridges are frequent on NH48. Court appearance usually mandatory for severe overloading.
